# AI Heroes

> AI Heroes B.V. is a full-service AI agency in Groningen, the Netherlands (KvK 42051968). Three pillars: training, consulting and software. From change management to technical implementation, with a European focus: data sovereignty, EU AI Act compliance and no vendor lock-in. Office: Aarhusweg 4-16, 9723 JJ Groningen. Contact: hello@aiheroes.io.

AI Heroes is een full-service AI agency in Groningen: training, consulting en software onder één dak. Vanuit Groningen, voor heel Europa.

## Services (English)

- [Services overview](https://aiheroes.io/en/services): training, consulting and software offerings
- [AI training for teams](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/training): in-company workshops, from AI Foundations to AI for Developers, from EUR 2,500 per day
- [AI consulting](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/consulting): readiness scan, business cases, roadmap and implementation guidance, from EUR 3,000
- [AI software & implementation](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/software): proof of concept (6 days, from EUR 8,000), custom AI, system integration, digital twins
- [AI literacy training](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/ai-literacy-training): EU AI Act Article 4 compliance training with certificate; Dutch enforcement starts 2 August 2026
- [In-company AI training](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/incompany-ai-training): on-site training across the Netherlands
- [Sovereign AI consultancy](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/eu-consultancy): European AI without vendor lock-in
- [Digital independence](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/digital-independence): training, consultancy and development for European alternatives and compliance
- [AI agency for the Netherlands](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/ai-agency-netherlands)
- [AI agency in Groningen](https://aiheroes.io/en/services/ai-agency-groningen): based in Groningen, the AI capital of Europe

## Diensten (Nederlands)

- [Dienstenoverzicht](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten): training, consulting en software
- [AI-training voor teams](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/training): incompany workshops, van AI Foundations tot AI voor Developers, vanaf EUR 2.500 per dag
- [AI consultancy](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/consultancy): readiness scan, business cases, roadmap en implementatiebegeleiding, vanaf EUR 3.000
- [AI software & implementatie](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/software): proof of concept (6 dagen, vanaf EUR 8.000), maatwerk AI, systeemintegratie, digital twins
- [AI-geletterdheidstraining](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/ai-geletterdheid-training): invulling van artikel 4 EU AI Act, met certificaat; handhaving vanaf 2 augustus 2026
- [Incompany AI-training](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/incompany-ai-training): training op locatie, door heel Nederland
- [Soevereine AI consultancy](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/eu-consultancy): Europese AI zonder lock-in
- [Digitale onafhankelijkheid](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/digitale-onafhankelijkheid): training, consultancy en development voor Europese alternatieven en compliance
- [AI bureau voor Nederland](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/ai-bureau-nederland)
- [AI consultancy in Groningen](https://aiheroes.io/nl/diensten/ai-consultancy-groningen): thuisbasis Groningen, de AI-hoofdstad van Europa

## Company

- [About AI Heroes](https://aiheroes.io/en/about): team, approach and the Groningen story
- [Over AI Heroes](https://aiheroes.io/nl/over-ons)
- [Case studies](https://aiheroes.io/en/cases): Medux (70% lower customer-service costs), OLX, InnoEnergy, Trabu (prototype in 6 days)
- [AI Salon Groningen](https://aiheroes.io/nl/ai-salon): monthly AI event in Groningen
- [De AI Storm](https://aiheroes.io/nl/de-ai-storm): as featured on Dutch television (RTL 7, RTL Z, Videoland)
